subcodes.first_line: O wanderer of desert and plain in the path of God! Blessed art thou, who callest upon the Name of Truth and turnest toward the sanctuary of His Name [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای سرگشته دشت و صحرا در سبیل الهى خوشا بحال تو که باسم حق ندا کنى و بشطر اسم
subcodes.subjects: @power; greatness; centrality of the Covenant, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @firmness in the Covenant, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @trust and reliance in God; turning to Him at all times
